metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4876
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 4d,e,f: Immunoelectron microscopic detection of immunogold labeling of Gγ7 (GNG7) by antisera showed localization to synaptic vesicles in cerebellar parallel fiber, climbing fiber and hippocampal Schaffer collateral presynaptic terminals.

Figure 5c: similar observations are made in GABAergic presynaptic terminals in rat cerebellum. Synapses between basket cell axonal terminals and Purkinje somata were analyzed.. Experimental description: M&M: "Deeply anesthesized rats were sacrificed by decapitation. The cerebellar cortex was immediately removed and cut into small cubes of about 8 mm3"

antibody:
"The following rabbit polyclonal antisera against G-protein subtypes were used: ... Gγ7 (AS 361; Leopoldt et al., 1997) ... All G-protein subtype-specific antisera were characterized for immunocytochemistry with respect to specificity and crossreactivity (Brunk et al., 1999; this paper)."

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
